_comment: Stage 9e Miters (sharp miter at reflex): bevel TWO edges meeting at the L-shape's reflex corner — vertical reflex edge + horizontal edge to (1,0,+0.5). Expected fail until reflex sharp-miter logic lands: vibe3d creates BVs in all 3 faces around v3, including a BV in the BEV-NONBEV face that lands OUTSIDE the bulk (in the L's missing quadrant) at (0,+0.1,+0.5). Blender's sharp miter for reflex skips that BV and reuses v3 itself, giving 15v/10f vs vibe3d's 16v/11f.
